The fascination of cliff diving
programme.desc: Orlando Duque, Gary Hunt and Rhiannan Iffland discuss how important it is to stay sharp throughout the season. programme.title: The perfect take-off
programme.desc: Finding the perfect take-off is the most important step in creating a good dive. Finding the perfect take-off is the most important step in creating a good dive. Orlando Duque, Gary Hunt and Rhiannan Iffland share the challenge of finding the placement for a take-off.

programme.title: The adventure begins
programme.desc: Meet three talented young American racers as they are thrust into the Rally Raid racing scene. Meet three young and talented American racers as they are thrust into the international Rally Raid racing scene: Seth Quintero, Blade Hildebrand and Mitch Guthrie Jr.

programme.title: The White Maze
programme.desc: It's 'mission impossible' for a pair of freeskiers who attempt to ski the highest peak in Eastern Siberia. A pair of freeskiers embark on their own personal 'mission impossible' by attempting to ski the highest peak in Eastern Siberia. Matthias Haunholder and Matthias Mayr will push beyond their limits to conquer this mountain at the edge of the world.

programme.title: Israel
programme.desc: In Israel, the brothers explore Jerusalem and surf beaches in both Tel Aviv and the coastal town of Old Jaffa. In Israel, the brothers eat falafel and surf Hilton Beach in Tel Aviv before exploring the four quarters of the Old City in Jersualem and visiting the Separation Wall in the West Bank. Then it's time for surfing in the coastal town of Old Jaffa.

programme.title: The deadline is looming
programme.desc: 'Mad' Mike Whiddett begins stripping down the Lamborghini in order to build it into a powerful ride. 'Mad' Mike Whiddett continues his mission to turn a Lamborghini into his dream car by stripping it down in order to build it into a powerful ride. The pressure is on as the deadline approaches.

programme.title: Karl Meltzer: Made to Be Broken
programme.desc: Ultrarunner Karl Meltzer embarks on his third and final attempt to run the Appalachian Trail in record time. Ultrarunner Karl Meltzer has long dreamed of setting the speed record for crossing the USA's Appalachian Trail. Now he sets out for his third and final attempt to run the 3,524km (2,188 miles) in less than 46 days, 8 hours and 6 minutes.

programme.title: Race day factors
programme.desc: Finn Iles and Kate Courtney share how music, bike suspension and air quality all affect their performance. World Cup rookies Finn Iles and Kate Courtney, along with their fellow pros, talk about the music they listen to when they want to fire themselves up on race day. Plus, they discuss the importance of bike suspension and air quality on performance.

programme.title: How to capture perfect drone shots
programme.desc: Loads of people have a drone – but how can you use them best for professional action shots? Drones are cheaper and more environmental-friendly than a heli. Loads of people have one – but how can you use them best for taking professional action shots? Learn how to fly them and get the optimum angles.

programme.title: How to create the perfect cable cam shot
programme.desc: Snowboarder John Jackson and the Pirate film crew are in deep powder in Japan capturing amazing cable cam shots. Follow snowboarder John Jackson and the Pirate film crew to Japan into deep powder to capture amazing cable cam shots in conditions where drones can’t fly – in a snow storm or through narrow trees.

programme.title: The Flag Drops
programme.desc: The preparation's done. All that now stands between the teams and their goal is 1,350km (840 miles) of desert. The months, even years, of preparation have led up to this moment. Now, all that stands between the five teams and their goal is 1,350km (840 miles) of punishing desert driving, where anything can happen.

programme.title: The Signal Hill Speed Run
programme.desc: The contest that established downhill skateboarding was a festival of speed, partying and danger. A ridiculously steep hill in California was the stage for downhill skateboarding's first contest and it quickly became the epicentre of the absurd new sport. The Signal Hill Speed Run was a festival of innovation, speed and danger.

programme.title: Four Hawaiians face off
programme.desc: Go inside the lives of four Hawaiians and Pipe specialists in the weeks leading up to Volcom Pipe Pro. Go inside the lives of four Hawaiians and Pipe specialists in the weeks leading up to the Volcom Pipe Pro, the biggest event on the North Shore outside of the Triple Crown and a chance to win bragging rights at the world's most dangerous wave.

programme.title: Down memory lane
programme.desc: The four Hawaiians and Pipe specialists discuss how their childhood shaped their love of surfing. The four Hawaiians and Pipe specialists revisit the past and discuss how their formative years set them on a path to a career as a pro surfer.

programme.title: Wingmen
programme.desc: Three elite BASE jumpers face the unknown on a global journey to find the best wingsuit and BASE jump spots. Three of the world's best wingsuit flyers set out on a global journey in search of perfect spots for proximity flying and BASE jumps. From Brazil to China, the trio face some of the most thrilling and challenging flights of their lives.

programme.title: Encounter at Ribbon Reef
programme.desc: Dr Dean Miller and his research crew embark on a five-day expedition to study the elusive Dwarf Minke whale. Researcher and scientist Dr Dean Miller and his crew embark on a five-day expedition to document and study the reclusive Dwarf Minke whale, a rare creature that makes a brief annual appearance at Australia's Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: The Race Track
programme.desc: At the Del Mar racetrack in San Diego, California, meet one of the few female jockeys in pro horse racing. Chantal Sutherland is one of the few female jockeys in horse racing. Accompany her to the legendary Del Mar racetrack in San Diego, California, as she meets the owners, trainers, and agents who can help her make an international name for herself.

programme.title: California's Comeback
programme.desc: Chris Benchetler skis his home slopes in California, USA, exploring previously unreachable areas. Chris Benchetler skis his home slopes at Mammoth Mountain in California, USA and the surrounding backcountry, exploring areas of the Sierra Nevada that have been inaccessible for years due to severe drought.

programme.title: It's Always Cloudy in British Columbia
programme.desc: Low visibility threatens the crew’s trip to British Columbia, but they’re determined to make the best of it. programme.title: Dino Dan
programme.desc: Dan shows what dinosaurs used to look like and how they lived.

programme.title: Dino Dan
programme.desc: Dan learns how dinosaurs get their name. Dan finds a feather at the park.

programme.title: Dino Dan
programme.desc: The kids make a stop motion animation movie for art class that features the Trex but Angie and Dan can't seem to agree about certain T-Rex 'facts'. Dan tries to find herbivores that will flee or those that will fight.

programme.title: Dino Dan
programme.desc: Jim the Reptile Expert returns to Mrs. Carver's class with a Chameleon, prompting Dan to question if the Stegosaurus could change the colour of its plates. Dan takes the poem 'The Night Before Christmas' and gives it a dinosaur spin.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: When Polly and pals fail to attract club members to their Animal Club, they head to the forest to find more exotic animals and recruit more members.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: An overscheduled Polly bites off more than she can chew when she tries to help Peanut make countless cupcakes and loses her locket in the process.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Polly and her friends are attending Camp, and must use all the skills they have learned to stop a disguised Griselle from stealing her locket.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Polly and pals must stop Grisella's quest to put Littleton in a dome. But Polly's locket is on the fritz.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Han's new therapist suggests that Max needs to confront her 'daddy issues' and fear of intimacy, she reluctantly heads to Rhode Island to track down her birth father. Also, Oleg is up in arms when Sophie wants him to help out around the house.

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: In an effort to boost their chances of getting pregnant, Molly encourages Mike to join her in giving up caffeine and eating healthier, causing them both to have major withdrawals.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: After Peter starts an anti-immigration group, he learns that he was born in Mexico. Unable to prove his citizenship, he ends up working as a groundskeeper on his father-in-law's estate and leading the fight for immigrant rights.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: When Brian's proposition to rename Quahog's high school 'Adam West High,' to honour the late Mayor West, is successful, he feels encouraged to run for office as Quahog's new mayor. The race takes a turn when Quagmire campaigns against Brian.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: After Tina accidentally wrecks the car, and gets the whole family involved with a slimy insurance agent she worries that she's a 'jinx.'.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: After Gene gets suckered into dating Courtney, his first girlfriend ever, the entire family wants him to break up with her when they decide she's totally annoying.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: When Ted picks up a 'lucky penny,' a maelstrom of bad luck ensues, but picking up the penny may be the best thing that Ted has ever done. Ted concludes that the stray coin changed more than just his luck and that it was his destiny to pick up that penny.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Tasha returns home early from a trip and finds Malik throwing a wild party at their house and shuts it down. Fed up with his mom running his life, Malik asks her to move out.
